scope: ACL 2027 supplement page 15 metric-boundary bridge v2 visual-density iteration

motivation.target_page_before: Round 13 density audit ranked page 15 as the lowest non-reference page after the theory hypothesis-boundary v2 pass.
motivation.goal_alignment: Use a text-free AI metric-boundary lens slot plus additional registered render crops to make the Metric Boundary Summary page less sparse without changing the evidence boundary or page count.

measurement.layout_guard_active_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 238, matching tests/test_paper_layout.py figure-density checks
measurement.page_active245_definition: RGB pixels where max(channel)-min(channel) > 15 or mean(channel) < 245, used for sparse-page raster review
measurement.red_pixel_fraction_definition: RGB pixels where R > 150, G < 90, and B < 90

claim_boundary.paper_use: visual reading guide for connecting proxy, grounding, material, and navigation metric families to their claim boundaries
claim_boundary.notes: The metric-boundary lens AI slot is a schematic for reading structure only. Evidence-bearing panels remain registered render crops and deterministic overlays composed by paper/shared/figures/gen_supplement_task_media_atlases.py.

metric_boundary_lens.role: AI-generated metric-boundary lens schematic only; deterministic figure code draws paper labels, boundary text, and all evidence-source annotations.

final_figure.local_visual_evidence: The standalone v2 bridge adds a metric-boundary lens strip with a text-free AI schematic and three original/noMDL selected-failure render pairs. The four metric-family lanes remain readable, and the red fallback fraction stays below the guard threshold.

pdf_review.local_visual_evidence: Rendered page 15 is visibly denser, the enlarged full-textwidth bridge remains inside the one-column layout, the caption stays complete, and pages 14 and 16 show no spill or clipping regression.

post_review_density_audit.page15_status: Page 15 no longer appears in the lowest 12 pages after the full-textwidth bridge placement.

tests.result: RED first for missing metric-boundary lens strip/source registration and later for the full-textwidth include; GREEN after implementation: 2 passed, 72 deselected.
completed; pages 14-16 regenerated for local visual and density review.
completed; page 15 regenerated at 90 dpi for direct comparison with the round 13 density baseline.

review_mode.reason: Local pure visual review was used; no separate clean-room subagent was dispatched because independent delegation was not requested.

residual_risk: This pass improves page 15 but does not complete the broader supplement-wide visual iteration. Round 14 ranks page 39 as the next low-density non-reference page.
